_comment: Smoke-test manifest for the MODFLOW worker (job-0220). Points at the minimal 10x10 single-layer steady-state GWF deck in this fixtures/ dir. Stage these files into gs://${TRID3NT_CACHE_BUCKET}/modflow/<run_id>/ alongside this manifest, then invoke the entrypoint with --manifest-uri pointing here. Replace <CACHE_BUCKET> and <RUN_ID> at stage time. This is a pure-GWF deck (no GWT) so the head output proves binary convergence end-to-end; the Case 2 production deck adds the gwf/ + gwt/ subdirectory layout the entrypoint reconstructs.
